title: WinFlowz - Tools and Training for Productivity

meta.description: WinFlowz combines Windows productivity training, Obsidian plugins, and Chrome tools for YouTube and workflow research.

hero.title: Productivity Plugins & Windows Training
hero.subTitle: Chrome tools for YouTube workflows, Obsidian plugins for content curation, and a Windows productivity course built around practical lessons.

clients.title: Built for real workflows
clients.subTitle: For people who want one place for Windows habits, note-taking tools, and content workflows they actually use.

features.title: Tools and training that fit together
features.subTitle: WinFlowz combines course content, browser tools, and Obsidian workflows so the site teaches the same system it helps you use.

workflow.title: A workflow stack built from the ground up

tabs.heading: ObsiFlowz
tabs.content: Obsidian plugins for content curation, plugin search, and note-taking workflows that stay close to markdown and local files.

tabs.heading: ReplayGlowz
tabs.content: A Chrome extension for YouTube research, bookmarking, and annotation so useful videos turn into reusable knowledge.

tabs.heading: Windows Mastery
tabs.content: A Windows productivity course with 8 modules and practical guidance on focus, time, actions, and shortcuts.

testimonials.title: What the offer includes
testimonials.subTitle: Three product lines, one training path, and a site that keeps the tools and the course connected.

main.content: Congratulations, Diane! I just spent 20 minutes in it and I'm already wondering what I've been doing with my life until now :)) Lots of goodies to improve my work. I love it!
main.author: Florin Muresan

statistics.description: training modules in the Windows course
core product lines: Windows, Obsidian, and YouTube workflows

cta.title: Build a system you can actually use
cta.subTitle: Start with the training path, then add tools as your workflow evolves.
